name: web_scan
description: Get page content and the browser tab list. First call should use mode=tabs_only to discover current tabs and pick a valid switch_tab_id. If no tabs are available, open a page via command_run (system browser) and then call web_scan(mode=tabs_only) again.

switch_tab_id.description: Optional. If provided, switch to this tab before scanning.

mode.description: Scan mode. tabs_only: only return tab list. simplified_html: return filtered HTML (lighter, better for LLM). text_only: return filtered plain text.
